ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monthly_waste_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the data is recorded */,
  "yellow_bin_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected in the yellow bin (in kg) */,
  "red_bin_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected in the red bin (in kg) */,
  "blue_bin_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected in the blue bin (in kg) */,
  "white_bin_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected in the white bin (in kg) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the data */,
  "yellow_bin_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the yellow bin (in kg) */,
  "red_bin_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the red bin (in kg) */,
  "blue_bin_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the blue bin (in kg) */,
  "white_bin_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the white bin (in kg) */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_waste_data_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES collection_schedule ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_waste_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (neighborhood) */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region in which the location is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_types" (
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste type */,
  "waste_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste type (e.g., recyclables, general waste) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste type */,
  "recycling_value" REAL /* Value of recycling the waste type */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the waste type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection schedule entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the collection schedule */,
  "collection_day" TEXT /* Day of the week when collection occurs */,
  "bin_color" TEXT /* Color of the bin for the scheduled collection */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the collection (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the collection */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_schedule_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection schedule */,
  "actual_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the actual collection event */,
  "yellow_bin_collected_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected from the yellow bin (in kg) */,
  "red_bin_collected_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected from the red bin (in kg) */,
  "blue_bin_collected_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected from the blue bin (in kg) */,
  "white_bin_collected_kg" REAL /* Weight of materials collected from the white bin (in kg) */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the truck used for collection */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver who performed the collection */,
  "yellow_bin_status" TEXT /* Status of the yellow bin (e.g., full, half-full) */,
  "red_bin_status" TEXT /* Status of the red bin (e.g., full, half-full) */,
  "blue_bin_status" TEXT /* Status of the blue bin (e.g., full, half-full) */,
  "white_bin_status" TEXT /* Status of the white bin (e.g., full, half-full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES collection_schedule ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recycling_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recycling rate entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the recycling rate is calculated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the recycling rate */,
  "recycling_rate" REAL /* Calculated recycling rate as a percentage */,
  "target_rate" REAL /* Target recycling rate for the location */,
  "actual_vs_target" REAL /* Difference between actual and target recycling rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recycling_rates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_awareness_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign's goals */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign associated with the participation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where participation occurred */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from participants */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the participation (e.g., reduction in waste) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_participation_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_participation_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES public_awareness_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated collection event */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low recycling, high waste) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES collection_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, waste manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "department_access" TEXT /* Departments the role has access to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "truck_number" TEXT /* Truck number for identification */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the truck */,
  "capacity_kg" REAL /* Capacity of the truck (in kg) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iot_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IoT device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the IoT device (e.g., sensor, camera) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iot_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
